R

radialAcceleration(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Adds acceleration in the direction from the emitter's location to each individual particle's randomized position.
radialVelocity(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Adds velocity in the direction from the emitter's location to each individual particle's randomized position.
randomHSVA(float[]) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
 
randomHSVA(float, float, float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Randomizes the initial color of particles generated by this Emitter.
render(CampaignEngineLayers, CombatViewport) - Method in class particleengine.ParticlesCampaignRenderer
 
render(CombatEngineLayers, ViewportAPI) - Method in class particleengine.Particles
 
reportCurrentLocationChanged(LocationAPI, LocationAPI) - Method in class particleengine.Particles
 
revolutionAcceleration(float) - Method in class particleengine.ParticleData
 
revolutionAcceleration(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
 
revolutionRate(float) - Method in class particleengine.ParticleData
 
revolutionRate(float, float) - Method in class particleengine.Emitter
Causes particles to revolve around the emitter's location at the time of generation.
runWhilePaused() - Method in class particleengine.Particles
